steps.title: Find the subject of the verb
steps.content: The clause begins with a writing technique that, so the verb must agree with the singular subject a writing technique (the relative pronoun that stands for it).

steps.title: Apply subject‑verb agreement
steps.content:
D) creates supplies the singular -s form that matches the singular subject a writing technique.
A) create, B) are creating, and C) have created each use a plural or plural‑progressive form, violating subject‑verb agreement.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
